home.heroHeadline: I turn biology into ventures. And science into health.
home.heroSubtitle: Scientist, entrepreneur, longevity expert. Top 1% of the world's most influential scientists (Stanford, 2023).
home.tedxQuote: To beat cancer, you have to think like a cell.

science.label: Science
science.desc: Frontier research in nanomedicine, biomimetic materials and longevity medicine — published in Nature Materials, Nature Nanotechnology, and 200+ peer-reviewed journals.

ventures.label: Ventures
ventures.desc: From lab to market: I have founded and led deeptech startups in biotech, nanomedicine and precision health, working with Roche, Novartis, Gilead and other global leaders.

longevity.label: Longevity
longevity.desc: Director of the Human Longevity Program at IRCCS San Raffaele, Rome: research and clinical practice to extend health span, not just lifespan.

about.title: About
about.metaDesc: Full professor, Director of the Human Longevity Program, founder of biotech startups. A career spanning Houston, Rome and the world.
about.bioIntro: I am Ennio Tasciotti. I have spent twenty years building bridges between basic research and applied medicine — first at the Scuola Normale di Pisa, then at Houston Methodist Research Institute, today at IRCCS San Raffaele in Rome.

science.title: Science
science.metaDesc: Nanomedicine, biomimetic materials, longevity medicine: three research areas, 200+ publications, 15 international patents.
science.heroManifesto: My research has merged engineering, biology and medicine to overcome biological barriers in cancer, inflammatory disease and tissue regeneration.

nanomedicine.name: Nanomedicine
nanomedicine.desc: Nanoscale delivery systems engineered to bypass biological barriers and deliver therapeutics with precision into diseased tissue. The Multistage Vector (Nature Nanotechnology, 2008) and the Leukosome (Nature Materials, 2016) are among the most cited outcomes.

biomimetic.name: Biomimetic Materials
biomimetic.desc: Extracellular matrix scaffolds and engineered materials that guide bone, cartilage and cardiac tissue regeneration by modulating local immune response without toxicity.

longevity.name: Longevity Medicine
longevity.desc: Study of the molecular mechanisms of aging, chronic inflammation and organ function loss. Clinical direction of the Human Longevity Program at IRCCS San Raffaele.

publications.title: Publications
publications.metaDesc: Over 200 peer-reviewed articles in nanomedicine, biomaterials and longevity. Filter by year, topic area or contribution type.

ventures.title: Ventures
ventures.metaDesc: Startups founded, advisory boards, strategic consulting for Roche, Novartis, Gilead and other pharmaceutical and health sector leaders.

longevity.title: Longevity
longevity.metaDesc: Articles, research and analysis on longevity medicine, healthy aging and the reform of primary healthcare.
longevity.heroTagline: Living longer is not the goal. Living better, longer, is.
longevity.authorNote: Prof. Ennio Tasciotti, IRCCS San Raffaele, Rome

storyAngles.title: Story angles for journalists
items: Chronic inflammation as the master switch of aging: new therapeutic targets.
Personalised nanomedicine: how biomimetic vesicles will transform cancer therapy.
From lab to market: why researchers must become entrepreneurs.
Reforming primary care through longevity medicine.
Top 1%: what it means to be among the 100,000 most-cited scientists in the world.

consultancy.title: Consultancy
consultancy.metaDesc: Scientific advisory board, fractional CSO and workshops for deeptech startups, venture capital funds and pharmaceutical companies.
consultancy.intro: Over twenty years of experience in research, entrepreneurship and global consulting. Available for focused engagements with selected companies and investors.

sab.name: Scientific Advisory Board
sab.tagline: For organisations that need scientific credibility at the leadership level.
sab.forWhom: Biotech, medtech and digital health startups at seed or Series A stage.
sab.includes: Scientific plan review, access to an international network, preparation for due diligence and investor pitches.

cso.name: Fractional CSO
cso.tagline: Senior scientific leadership, without the cost of a full-time CSO.
cso.forWhom: Deeptech bio-startups requiring strategic scientific leadership for 6–12 months.
cso.includes: R&D strategy, investor relations, scientific recruitment, patent supervision and publications.

speaking.name: Speaking & Workshops
speaking.tagline: High-calibre content for conferences, boardrooms and executive education.
speaking.forWhom: Pharmaceutical companies, industry associations, business schools and investment funds.
speaking.includes: Bespoke keynote, interactive scientific workshop, Q&A session with leadership.
